scripts.dev:all: NEXT_PUBLIC_DREDGING_MARINE_APP_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_DREDGING_MARINE_APP_URL:-http://localhost:3121} npm run dev -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3120 & npm run dev:dm -- -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3121
scripts.build:dm: npm --prefix apps/nmdc-dredging-marine run build && node scripts/copy-standalone-assets.mjs dm
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:dm
scripts.start:all: NEXT_PUBLIC_DREDGING_MARINE_APP_URL=${NEXT_PUBLIC_DREDGING_MARINE_APP_URL:-http://localhost:3121} PORT=3120 HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 npm run start & PORT=3121 HOSTNAME=0.0.0.0 npm run start:dm
